ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading card */,
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set the card belongs to */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity level of the card (e.g., Rare, Common) */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the card */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the card's image */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the card (e.g., near mint, lightly played) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("set_id") REFERENCES sets ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading card set (e.g., 2ED, LEG) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the set */,
  "set_type" TEXT /* Type of set (e.g., expansion, core) */,
  "block" TEXT /* Block the set belongs to (e.g., Urza's, Kamigawa) */,
  "total_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of cards in the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rarity_levels" (
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rarity level */,
  "rarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the rarity level (e.g., Rare, Common) */,
  "rarity_description" TEXT /* Description of the rarity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card the price belongs to */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the card on the given date */,
  "daily_change" REAL /* Daily price change */,
  "daily_percent_change" REAL /* Daily percent change */,
  "weekly_change" REAL /* Weekly price change */,
  "weekly_percent_change" REAL /* Weekly percent change */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Market trend of the card (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., buyer, seller, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card on the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, card purchase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
